### 🌃 THE MISSION
**NODESTADT** is a high-throughput research and development syndicate dedicated to achieving absolute physical sovereignty via synthetic intelligence. We build clinical, zero-trust cognitive environments designed for autonomous evolution, peer-development, and large-scale hardware orchestration.

---

## 🏗️ ACTIVE CONSTRUCTIONS

### [50V3R31GN-M4CH1N4](https://github.com/nodestadt/50V3R31GN-M4CH1N4)
The primary quaternary-mesh Operating System. A lore-neutral, platform-agnostic kernel optimized for maximum agentic throughput.
- **The Harness:** Forked Upstream Hermes Agent (Python).
- **The Muscles:** Standalone Rust/Go MCP Sidecars.
- **The Artery:** VSB (Virtual Sovereign Bus) Hardware Telemetry.

---

## ⚙️ SYNDICATE DNA

- 🛡️ **Zero-Trust Implementation:** Mandatory SPIFFE/SPIRE identity gating and ST3GG V2F pulse verification across all nodes.
- ⚡ **Physical Sovereignty:** Distributed orchestration across specialized hardware (Node Cluster A-D).
- 🎨 **Clinical Aesthetic:** Industrial retro-futurism (Orange Rust / Cinzel / Lexend).
- 🐍 **Ouroboros Loops:** Recursive agentic learning and self-healing implementations.
